symbols: Roman arches and columns — the vestiges of earthly empire, grandeur now in shadow
bell tower in background — the Church persisting amid the ruins of pagan civilization
fiery sunset sky — the passage of time and the end of eras, beauty at the threshold of darkness
dark vegetation overtaking stone — nature reclaiming what human ambition built, the transience of earthly glory
description: A small, expressively painted view of a Roman architectural scene at sunset. In the foreground, a series of dark arches and classical columns form an arcade, partially obscured by deep shadow and climbing vegetation. Behind and above, a small building with warm-colored walls and a tall bell tower or campanile rises against a dramatic sky of orange, red, and deep blue. The brushwork is loose and textural, creating an atmospheric, almost visionary quality.
